label: 第246話
source_locator: 単行本28巻 目次 p.8
summary_short: 高専側は処刑人の剣を宿儺へ当てようと総攻撃を仕掛ける。日車は戦闘中に領域展延や反転術式を習得し、宿儺が五条に並ぶ才能を認めるほど急速に成長する。
summary_full: 高専側は処刑人の剣を宿儺へ当てようと総攻撃を仕掛ける。日車は戦闘中に領域展延や反転術式を習得し、宿儺が五条に並ぶ才能を認めるほど急速に成長する。宿儺は高専側の連携を捌きながら日車の才能を試す。日車は簡易領域を経ず領域展延を習得し、宿儺から五条に並ぶ原石と評価される。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The plan to get 宿儺 the death penalty goes awry but the jujutsu sorcerers still place their bets on the 処刑人の剣 to win. His inexperience may have resulted in this desperate situation but even 宿儺 recognizes that 日車寛見 's talent and determination may just be enough to get them out of it.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 日下部 uses 簡易領域 to defend himself and 日車. As 日車 curses his inexperience, 日下部 activates 簡易領域 to protect himself from 宿儺's slashes. The King of Curses notices that all of his opponents have improved their basic 呪力 reinforcement. Additionally, the 簡易領域, while not as effective as 領域展延 , sufficiently weakened his 術式 enough to reduce the damage dealt by his flying slashes. Meanwhile, 日下部 takes note of 宿儺's techniques. He speculates that 宿儺 cannot casually unleash enhanced 解 slashes, dubbed "the slashes that cut the world", as a 術式 typically requires a 縛り or charging time to broaden its target area. 日下部 breaks down each of 宿儺's techniques, summarizing that 捌 , a point-blank 解, and an slash that cuts the world cannot be defended against and will generally result in instant death. He wonders why 宿儺 isn't using his fire like back in 渋谷 , but gives up on worrying about it. 日下部 checks up on 日車, who apologizes for being unable to confiscate 宿儺's technique. 日下部 reassures 日車 that robbing 宿儺 of 神武解 and activating the 処刑人の剣 are good enough. He promises to stake his life to protect the lawyer since the 処刑人の剣 is their best chance at defeating the King of Curses. 宿儺 effortlessly takes down 脹相. 宿儺 comments on how his adversaries have bolstered their defenses and declares he'll test their speed next. 脹相 fires 穿血 at 宿儺, but he seemingly disappears before the beam of blood could hit him. Before 脹相 can react, 宿儺 appears before him and pierces two of his hands through his body, critically injuring the 呪胎九相図 Womb before throwing him aside as 悠仁 catches him. 宿儺 isolates 日車 by throwing him a great distance. A blade is then thrown at 宿儺, who deflects it into the air. The blade, revealed to be the cursed tool formerly wielded by 七海 , is then caught by 猪野 as he slashes down on 宿儺 with it. Despite blocking the blunt sword with his arm, 宿儺 notices the strike is stronger than expected as the ground beneath his feet gives way to the impact. 宿儺 realizes that the cursed tool is imbued with 七海's 十劃呪法 and kicks 猪野 away. 猪野 blocks the kick with the sword but nonetheless feels the heavy impact from the attack. 悠仁 and 日下部 approach 宿儺, but are forced on the defensive by his slashes. 日車 flips over 日下部's back and attempts to slash 宿儺 but he avoids it and grabs him. 宿儺 rapidly punches 日車 before throwing him far away to isolate him. He gives chase after 日車, with 悠仁 racing against him but quickly realizing how much faster 宿儺 is. As 日車 catches his fall inside a destroyed building, 宿儺 instantly appears before him and unleashes slashes that shred the building apart. 日車 uses domain amplification. Prior to the showdown, 悠仁 informed the others that 日車's 術式 could be used to save 伏黒恵 after their group decided on a plan for fighting 宿儺. 日車 explained that since the 処刑人の剣 can only kill a target that received the death sentence from ジャッジマン , and the 式神 has demonstrated the ability to distinguish multiple souls within an incarnated body as seen with 悠仁. He believes killing 宿儺 with the 処刑人の剣 would allow 恵's dormant soul to recover his body. "...By a man with talent equal to 五条悟's." Later that night, 悠仁 asked if 日車 wanted to die, since he can't use 反転術式 but is taking a pivotal role against battling 宿儺. 日車 explained that he wanted to punish himself, since he abandoned the law and vice versa. To do that, he wanted to fulfil his role and then die. 悠仁 resonated with the sentiment, but still felt that 日車 should stay alive. The lawyer refused the idea, as he could no longer look 悠仁 in the eyes due to the guilt he carries. Back in the present, it is revealed that 日車 used 領域展延 to neutralize the slashes, surprising 宿儺. Having awakened as a jujutsu sorcerer only less than two months ago, 日車's extraordinary growth with jujutsu sorcery fascinates 宿儺. The 処刑人の剣 rekindles its light, wielded by a sorcerer with talent that rivals even that of 五条悟 .
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 日車寛見 虎杖悠仁 宿儺 日下部篤也 猪野琢真 脹相 七海建人 (言及のみ) 伏黒恵 (言及のみ) 秤金次 (回想) 星綺羅羅 (回想) 狗巻棘 (回想) 乙骨憂太 (回想) 禪院真希 (回想) 憂憂 (回想) 五条悟 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 日下部篤也の術式 簡易領域 脹相の術式 赤血操術 百斂 穿血 百斂 穿血 呪具 神武解 (言及のみ) 七海's 鈍刀 日車寛見の術式 領域展延 七海建人の術式 十劃呪法 式神 ジャッジマン (言及のみ) 宿儺の術式 御廚子 捌 (言及のみ) 解／捌 (言及のみ) 解

key_events_verified_phase11: 高専側は処刑人の剣を宿儺へ当てようと総攻撃を仕掛ける。
日車は戦闘中に領域展延や反転術式を習得し、宿儺が五条に並ぶ才能を認めるほど急速に成長する。
宿儺は高専側の連携を捌きながら日車の才能を試す。
日車は簡易領域を経ず領域展延を習得し、宿儺から五条に並ぶ原石と評価される。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
